params.name: key
params.description: API key issued from your OpenMenu account.

params.name: s
params.description: Search term for a restaurant or menu item. Use `sample` for sandbox data.

params.name: offset
params.description: Page index for paginated results (0-based). Maximum page index is 10.

params.name: r
params.description: Limit results to restaurants only.

params.name: mi
params.description: Limit results to menu items only.

params.name: postal_code
params.description: Limit results to a postal or ZIP code. Required if `city` is not provided.

params.name: city
params.description: Limit results to a city. Required if `postal_code` is not provided.

params.name: state
params.description: Optional two-letter state or province code to narrow results.

params.name: country
params.description: Country for the search area, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. US).

items.docs: Find restaurants, menu items, and sample menus by location and search term. At least one of `postal_code` or `city` is required, along with `country`. Use `s=sample` for sandbox data.

params.name: key
params.description: API key issued from your OpenMenu account.

params.name: id
params.description: Restaurant ID from a search or location response. Use `sample` for sandbox data.

items.docs: Return the full profile for one restaurant: contact and location, environment, hours, menus, and menu groups. Use `id=sample` for sandbox data.

params.name: key
params.description: API key issued from your OpenMenu account.

params.name: s
params.description: Optional restaurant name filter.

params.name: offset
params.description: Page index for paginated results (0-based). Maximum page index is 10 unless your key has paging limits removed.

params.name: postal_code
params.description: Limit results to a postal or ZIP code. Required if `city` is not provided.

params.name: city
params.description: Limit results to a city. Required if `postal_code` is not provided.

params.name: state
params.description: Optional two-letter state or province code to narrow results.

params.name: country
params.description: Country for the search area, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. US).

items.docs: List restaurants in a geographic area. Optionally filter by restaurant name using the `s` parameter. At least one of `postal_code` or `city` is required, along with `country`.

params.name: key
params.description: API key issued from your OpenMenu account.

params.name: id
params.description: Restaurant ID from a search or location response.

items.docs: Return coupons, specials, and daily deals for a single restaurant.

params.name: key
params.description: API key issued from your OpenMenu account.

params.name: s
params.description: Ingredient name or partial match. Use `sample` for documentation sandbox.

params.name: offset
params.description: Page index for paginated results (0-based). Maximum page index is 10 unless your key has paging limits removed.

params.name: food_group
params.description: Restrict to a USDA-style food group.

params.name: nutrition
params.description: Include full nutrition block in each result.

items.docs: Search the ingredient database for nutrition labels, claims, and food-group filtering. Use `s=sample` for sandbox data.

params.name: key
params.description: API key issued from your OpenMenu account. Enterprise access required.

params.name: postal_code
params.description: Limit results to a postal or ZIP code. Required if `city` is not provided.

params.name: city
params.description: Limit results to a city. Required if `postal_code` is not provided.

params.name: state
params.description: Optional two-letter state or province code to narrow results.

params.name: country
params.description: Country for the search area, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. US).

items.docs: Return trending menu terms for a geographic area, with frequency and scores. Requires a paid API key with enterprise access enabled.

params.name: key
params.description: API key issued from your OpenMenu account. Enterprise access required.

params.name: id
params.description: Restaurant to analyze.

params.name: postal_code
params.description: Limit results to a postal or ZIP code. Required if `city` is not provided.

params.name: city
params.description: Limit results to a city. Required if `postal_code` is not provided.

params.name: state
params.description: Optional two-letter state or province code to narrow results.

params.name: country
params.description: Country for the search area, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. US).

items.docs: Compare a restaurant's menu against regional trends to identify intersecting staples and gaps. Requires a paid API key with enterprise access enabled.
